---
title: "Activities"
---
## August 2027
- AARMS Summer school.

## August 2026
- Meeting to be held at Memorial University.

## March 2025
- We are running the [macpan2 calibration working group](https://github.com/ahurford/macpan2-calibration-working-group/blob/main/README.md) on Wed March 4 and 11. Please email Amy Hurford if you would like to participate.

## February 2026
- [ACCDMi newsletter](https://ahurford.github.io/accdmi-website/feb-2026-newsletter.html)
- Congratulations to ACCDMi trainee [Dr. Joseph Baafi](https://github.com/jbaafi) for completing his PhD Biology on _Modelling the Impact of Seasonality and Climate Warming on Mosquito Population Dynamics: Insights for Vector Control Strategies_ at Memorial University. Congrats Joseph!

## January 2026
- A. Hurford gave presentations at U Montreal (St. Hyacinthye)/PHAC (> 40 participants including virtual audience), York University, and McMaster University.

## December 2025
-  ACCDMi symposium (online) to be held on Wednesday December 10. Details [here](https://ahurford.github.io/accdmi-website/dec-symposium.html)

## November 2025
- [ACCDMi newsletter](https://ahurford.github.io/accdmi-website/nov-2025-newsletter.html)

## October 2025
- [ACCDMi newsletter](https://ahurford.github.io/accdmi-website/oct-2025-newsletter.html)
-  A. Hurford and J. Mack avian influenza research trip.
-  Advertise 2026 ACCDMi scholarships. 

## September 2025  
-  Trainees invited to apply for an ACCDMi scholarship. [Details here](https://ahurford.github.io/accdmi-website/scholarship.html)
-  ACCDMi members meeting.  
-  ACCDMi trainee members added to website.
-  Launch website.
-  Create repository for modelling education resources.
